text: If workers/subcontractors are observed working in an unsafe condition, they will be notified by a GS  Construction  Mountain,  LLC  supervisor. This  will  serve  as  a  verbal  warning. Repeated offenses will result in a written warning in the form of a Jobsite Hazard Notice. We ask that the work be corrected immediately, and the Superintendent notified in writing within 24 hours that the issues have been corrected. Failure to correct safety hazards will result in the removal of involved employees and/or equipment not in compliance off the jobsite.
